title: The Techno Pack
body:
As tribute to Technoblade who died from sarcoma, a rare form of cancer, I've created this resourcepack in remembrance of him. This is the ultimate Technoblade Tribute Texturepack featuring various references to countless of Techno's videos. I've tried to make this pack so it works as an overlay with most other resourcepacks. I hope you enjoy!

You can support cancer research in Techno's name by donating here to the [Sarcoma Foundation of America](https://www.curesarcoma.org/technoblade-tribute/)!

Rename the folder "! §b§k!§r §d§lThe Techno Pack §b§k!" after you download it for the fancy name!

[Planet Minecraft page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/the-techno-pack-technoblade-tribute-texturepack/). [CurseForge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/the-techno-pack).

Note: Most textures require [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) (or EMF, ETF, and CIT Resewn)!

**I'm not planning on updating _this_ pack again for a long time if ever, but I _am_ still updating [Technofault](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/technofault) which is another Technoblade-themed Resource Pack that still contains most of the assets from this pack!**


## Mod list / Credits:

### General Techno Textures:

24% of pigs will have Technoblade crowns and 4% of pigs will have a full Technoblade outfit.
You can also get the textures by naming a pig "Techno" for just the crown, or "Technoblade" for the full outfit.
- original by me

~20% of Piglin Brutes are Technoblade himself and ~20% of Piglins will be wearing Techno outfits!
Again, you can also get these texture by naming the mobs "Technoblade".
- original by me - Brutes by [oscar098](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/technoblade-brute-amp-pig/)

All Zombified Piglins are Techno's GOONS!!!
Just hope they rally for you and not against you. :)
- original by me - model by [oscar098](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/technoblade-brute-amp-pig/)

Armor stands are now Technoblade Memorial Statues!
(Inspired by the statue in Hypixel's Main Lobby and on TimeDeo's SkyBlock island)
- original by me

Steve is now HD Technoblade!
- texture by [dreamCritting](https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/technoblade-hd/)

If you name a Feather "YouTooz" you can have your very own TECHNO YOUTOOZ!!!
- by [_Cypress](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/dream-smp-texture-pack-by-cypress-streams/)

You can get some festive cheer by naming a Diamond Sword "Christmas Spirit" to give it a Candy Cane texture!
(in reference to Techno's Christmas Spirit video)
- original by me

Golden Helmets are now Technoblade Crowns!
They are also renamed to "Golden Crown".
- by [deeveesss](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/techno-crowns/) - suggested by [AAAAAAAAAA](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/aaaaaaaaaa/)

Diamond Swords now have golden handles inlayed with a ruby to match Techno's channel icon.
- original by me - suggested by [AAAAAAAAAA](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/aaaaaaaaaa/)

Five Techno-Themed Paintings are included.
- original by me

Elytras are now Technoplanes in both name and texture!
- original by me

Pig Snout banner pattern is replaced with Techno's Agro Pig Logo!
It replaces the pattern for the shield too! (Using White Dye for the pattern is recommended)
- original by me - suggested by [FIZNEY](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/fizney/)

Added Technoblade Tribute Statue. Watch [this video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PRgrc89lktA) for how to use.
- by [Hecco](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/technoblade-tribute-5617383/)

I added Technoblade's favorite texture from the original [Techno Pack](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i8AUid8jp8Q&t=531s): the explosion particles!
- original by me

### Potato War Themed Textures:

Hunger icons are now Potatoes!
- original by me

A Carrot on a Stick will now be a Potato on a Stick in both name and texture.
- original by me

Allays are now Potato Minions and Vexes are the inferior Carrot Minions!
- original by me

The book on the Enchanting Table is now The Art of War by Sun Tzu.
Also Written Books are The Art of War too.
- original by me

~20% of Squids have im_a_squid_kid's face!
You can also get the texture by naming a squid "Squid".
- original by me

Techno's SkyBlock Weapons now have their own textures!
This includes his Ember Rod, Pigman Sword, Reaper Scythe, and Staff of the Rising Sun.
You can access these textures both in SkyBlock and in Vanilla Minecraft!
- original by me

### Techno Dream SMP Themed Textures:

The Menu Background is now the inside of Technoblade's Cabin on the Dream SMP!
Also "Java Edition" now says "Techno Edition".
- original by me

The Splashes in the Main Menu are now Technoblade Quotes!
Also there are some special quotes in the Credits Roll when you beat the game!
- original by me

There's a chance for "[Technoblade Never Dies](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=G0YnFULVfh4)" by [Amosdoll Music](https://www.youtube.com/@AmosdollMusic) to play in the Main Menu!
- original by me

Withers are now infected with Technoblade!
When it spawns, Techno shouts, "Then die like one!" in reference to his speech on the Dream SMP.
Also, if you name the wither "Subscribe to Technoblade", it turns into a full Techno Wither!
- by [Odysseas](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/dream-smp-texture-pack/) and me

Wolves will look like they're wearing Netherite Armor if you tame them to make your Hound Armies more intimidating!
- original by me

If you name an emerald "Friendship Emerald" It will change the texture!
- by [FireNH](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/dream-smp-items/)

When a bell resonates, you can hear Techno chanting "One of us!"
-original by me

If you name a Netherite Sword "Orphan Obliterator" the texture will change to a fancier sword texture.
- original by me - suggested by [yangyangiscool](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/yangyangiscool/)

If you name a Crossbow "Rocket Launcher" the texture will change to look like a rocket launcher.
- originally by [Odysseas](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/dream-smp-texture-pack/) - redone by me

If you name a Netherite Pickaxe "Toothpick" it will change the texture.
And if you name a Netherite Axe "Axe of Peace" it will also change texture.
Matching textures for the other tools are also available in the "Optional Tools" folder under the "item" folder.
- original by me

Totems of Undieing are retextured to be like Technoblade.
Also when they are used, Technoblade shouts "Not even close, baby!" over the normal sound.
- by [Pojaaak](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/technoblade-totem-of-undying/)


If there are any other textures you think I should add, comment below!



## BONUS (not part of the pack):

If you don't know who Technoblade is, or haven't seen much of his content, here's a great two part documentary of his career:

1: [The Legend of Technoblade](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N_dIRLhSNaE) 2: [The Legacy of Technoblade](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=asNgWAsNTjc)

Check out my Technoblade-themed PVP Pack: [Technofault](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/technofault)!

You can download my custom Technoblade Cape texture [here](https://planetminecraft.com/mob-skin/technoblade-tb-memorial-cape/)!



"For God so loved the world, that he gave his only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish but have eternal life." - John 3:16

I don't know what happened to Techno after he died, but I pray that he would have been saved. I also pray that all of you who download this pack would accept Jesus' free gift of salvation and not wait until it's too late to be saved. If you have any questions, feel free to message me!


Technoblade Never Dies!
